title: phlomoides czuiliensis
intro: Phlomoides czuiliensis, also known as Chinese marsh clover or Chinese phlomis, is a type of flowering plant native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote digestion and alleviate symptoms of fever and sore throats. The health benefits of Phlomoides czuiliensis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, often combined with other herbs, to create teas or tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
